name: Paul Maddern
quote: I really enjoy attending NN1 Dev Club. The variety of speakers keeps every event fresh and technically engaging, and there’s always something interesting to take away from it. It’s also a genuinely well run meet up with a relaxed atmosphere, which makes it easy to chat with like-minded people and feel part of the community. Events like this are incredibly valuable for bringing developers together, and NN1 Dev Club does an amazing job of creating that space.
